title: Boarding Pass 3D Cultural Travel Poster AI
sourceTitle: Boarding Pass 3D Cultural Travel Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium 3D cultural travel poster where a giant vintage boarding pass becomes a portal to Gion Matsuri Lantern Parade in Kyoto, Japan. Subject: The boarding pass displays Destination: Kyoto, Japan and Event: Gion Matsuri Lantern Parade; ornate festival float, lantern carriers, silk robes, petals and lantern glow emerging from ticket emerges dramatically from inside the ticket and extends beyond its borders toward the viewer. Scene: Spectacular 3D cultural experience built around a giant angled boarding pass, with authentic participants, costumes, architecture, landscapes, props, animals or vehicles when relevant, and gold lantern light, falling petals, light festival haze filling the portal atmosphere. Composition: Fixed premium travel-poster composition: giant vintage boarding pass at a dramatic angle, ticket text readable, cultural event scene emerging from the ticket surface, foreground elements breaking the border, and balanced poster framing. Signature Elements: Giant vintage boarding pass, Kyoto, Japan, Gion Matsuri Lantern Parade, ornate festival float, lantern carriers, silk robes, petals and lantern glow emerging from ticket, gold lantern light, falling petals, light festival haze, portal emergence, authentic cultural detail, and premium 3D travel-poster polish. Style: Premium 3D travel-poster illustration, cinematic cultural tourism design, realistic yet magical portal effect, polished editorial detail, and high-end destination campaign finish. Color Palette: Ticket paper cream, destination-specific cultural colors, warm highlights, atmospheric shadows, and accent colors driven by gold lantern light, falling petals, light festival haze. Lighting: Cinematic portal lighting from within the ticket, realistic shadows under emerging figures and objects, atmospheric glow, and cohesive travel-poster illumination. Camera: Dramatic angled product-poster camera looking at the ticket portal, with clear destination text and immersive foreground emergence. Typography: Destination: Kyoto, Japan and Event: Gion Matsuri Lantern Parade appear clearly on the boarding pass; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium 3D cultural travel poster where a giant vintage boarding pass becomes a portal to Day of the Dead Flower Parade in Mexico City, Mexico. Subject: The boarding pass displays Destination: Mexico City, Mexico and Event: Day of the Dead Flower Parade; marigold-covered parade figures, papel picado, candles, musicians emerging from ticket emerges dramatically from inside the ticket and extends beyond its borders toward the viewer. Scene: Spectacular 3D cultural experience built around a giant angled boarding pass, with authentic participants, costumes, architecture, landscapes, props, animals or vehicles when relevant, and orange petals, candle glow, confetti, soft dusk haze filling the portal atmosphere. Composition: Fixed premium travel-poster composition: giant vintage boarding pass at a dramatic angle, ticket text readable, cultural event scene emerging from the ticket surface, foreground elements breaking the border, and balanced poster framing. Camera: Dramatic angled product-poster camera looking at the ticket portal, with clear destination text and immersive foreground emergence. Typography: Destination: Mexico City, Mexico and Event: Day of the Dead Flower Parade appear clearly on the boarding pass; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
